message:
🌱 kubeflow: jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args (#773)

* 🌱 Add ko: RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static mission

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Add kubeflow: jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args mission

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-3838-jupyter-web-app-set-custom-image-cmd-and-args",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args",
+    "description": "jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubeflow deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubeflow version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nhelm list -n kubeflow 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubeflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**Why you need this feature:**\nCurrently if someone would like to use a custom image they would need to create a Dockerfile, update the ENTRYPOINT and then push it to a public/private registry."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args",
+        "description": "#### What changes were proposed in this pull request?\r\nThis PR extends `PodDefault` to provide a capability to set a custom `command` and `args` for Notebook servers.\n\n#### Example\n- Create the following PodDefaut in the user's namespace:\n```\napiVersion: \"kubeflow.org/v1alpha1\"\nkind:\n```yaml\napiVersion: \"kubeflow.org/v1alpha1\"\nkind: PodDefault\nmetadata:\n  name: custom-entrypoint\nspec:\n  selector:\n    matchLabels:\n      custom-entrypoint: \"true\"\n  desc: \"Lauch as Jupyter Lab\"\n  command:\n  - jupyter\n  args:\n  - lab\n  - --notebook-dir=/workspace\n  - --ip=0.0.0.0\n  - --no-browser\n  - --allow-root\n  - --port=8888\n  - --NotebookApp.token=''\n  - --NotebookApp.password=''\n  - --NotebookApp.allow_origin='*'\n  - --NotebookApp.base_url=$(NB_PREFIX)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"jupyter-web-app: Set custom Image cmd and args\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "#### What changes were proposed in this pull request?\r\nThis PR extends `PodDefault` to provide a capability to set a custom `command` and `args` for Notebook servers.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: \"kubeflow.org/v1alpha1\"\nkind: PodDefault\nmetadata:\n  name: custom-entrypoint\nspec:\n  selector:\n    matchLabels:\n      custom-entrypoint: \"true\"\n  desc: \"Lauch as Jupyter Lab\"\n  command:\n  - jupyter\n  args:\n  - lab\n  - --notebook-dir=/workspace\n  - --ip=0.0.0.0\n  - --no-browser\n  - --allow-root\n  - --port=8888\n  - --NotebookApp.token=''\n  - --NotebookApp.password=''\n  - --NotebookApp.allow_origin='*'\n  - --NotebookApp.base_url=$(NB_PREFIX)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubeflow",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubeflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/3838",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/pull/6542"
+    },

+  },

+    ],

+  },

+}
